agents.mission: Collect company-level public facts and contact-channel candidates.
agents.guardrail: No private personal data; public business sources only.

agents.mission: Identify conversion, mobile, accessibility, and clarity issues on the existing website.
agents.guardrail: Do not invent business claims; separate observed facts from suggestions.

agents.mission: Create a low-scope redesign demo using public facts and a reusable template.
agents.guardrail: Unofficial demo label must be visible; no impersonation or live data collection.

agents.mission: Review whether the first contact is legal, low-volume, and reputationally safe.
agents.guardrail: Block mass outreach until a legal decision is recorded.

agents.mission: Approve, edit, or reject final outreach drafts before anything is sent.
agents.guardrail: Human approval is mandatory for real messages.
